waves.industry_first: No slot vendor publishes SP 800-90B Non-IID Track assessment per RNG backend + HSM bridge

waves.name: PAR Sheet Commitment v1.0
waves.headline: 180/180 gates PASS
waves.industry_first: Nijedan vendor (IGT/SG/L&W/Aristocrat/NetEnt/Pragmatic) ne objavljuje per-game cryptographic commitment nad reel strips + paytable

waves.name: ENT Entropy Battery (in-process)
waves.headline: 6/6 sources PASS all 5 ENT stats
waves.industry_first: ENT 5-stat battery (entropy/χ²/mean/MC π/serial ρ) na svih 5 PRNG backend-a + HSM bridge je sad in-process attestation, kombinovan sa NIST SP 800-22 (Wave 27) + SP 800-90B (Wave 39) = three-of-six Kimi-cited batteries landed

waves.name: General Entropy Health Monitor (streaming sliding-window)
waves.headline: 7/7 sources PASS · 5 PRNG + 2 adversarial
waves.industry_first: UKGC RTS 8.A.1 + MGA PPD §11.b + eCOGRA TG-VG require continuous RNG monitoring during operation — no vendor publishes streaming sliding-window χ² + Shannon entropy monitor with pluggable alert sinks for 5 PRNG backends + HSM bridge

waves.name: Demo Mode controller w/ auditor attestation
waves.headline: 6/6 scenarios PASS · tamper-detect verified
waves.industry_first: GLI-19 §3.3.9 (Replay Capability) + UKGC RTS 9 (demo distinction) + MGA PPD §11.b (auditor traceability) + eCOGRA TG-VG — no vendor publishes architectural assertNoRngCall guard + SHA-256 attestation + tamper-evident audit trail

waves.name: Closed-Form Portfolio (12 hybrid math kernels)
waves.headline: 32/32 closed-form solvers PASS in single runner
waves.industry_first: 12 mathematically independent closed-form solvers (N-tier H&W ladder, charge meter, supermeter Markov, sticky cash + reveal, walking-wild, megacluster, crash multiplier, parallel screens, Class-II bingo, sticky-cash collector + 2 compliance) — no vendor ships unified single-button portfolio with MC verification for all hybrid mechanics

waves.name: Exact Enumeration ground-truth RTP
waves.headline: 11/11 fixtures with EXACT analytical RTP
waves.industry_first: Direct analytical enumeration provides auditor-pinnable EXACT base-game RTP (closed-form sum over |symbols|^N per-line combinations) — not statistical estimate. No vendor publishes per-fixture exact RTP as deterministic ground truth.

waves.name: Must-Hit-By Jackpot (Mystery Progressive) — closed-form
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 5000 trigger cycles each
waves.industry_first: NIGC 25 CFR 542.7(c)-compliant Must-Hit-By Jackpot solver with provable E[N*] = span/(2c) + Var[N*] = span²/(12c²) closed-form. Effective per-spin RTP = c·(seed+cap)/(cap−seed) exactly disclosable to auditor.

waves.name: Pseudo-Must-Hit + Level Progression — escalating-hazard Markov
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 spins each
waves.industry_first: Soft-cap progressive with linear escalating hazard rate + N-level Markov chain stationary distribution (π_maxL = 1/(1+maxL·r), π_other = r·π_maxL) — closed-form per-level RTP share disclosure. No vendor publishes analytical level-chain solver.

waves.name: Multi-tier WAP Jackpot + Wheel — per-tier renewal solver
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 2000000 spins each (12.0M MC)
waves.industry_first: WAP progressive with wheel-selection: per-tier λ_i = p_trigger·w_i/Σw, E[pool_i@hit] = seed_i + c_i/λ_i, E[payout_i/spin] = c_i + λ_i·seed_i, normalized RTP share (Σ=1). Operator-funded portion = p_trigger·E[seed|hit] separately disclosable per UKGC RTS 12 + MGA PPD 2018.

waves.name: Bonus Buy / Feature Buy Variance Analyzer with CLT convergence
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 200000 buys each (1.2M MC)
waves.industry_first: Closed-form RTP=E[Y]/C, Var[Y], house edge, hit freq, win/loss ratio + **CLT convergence N* = (z·√Var[Y]/(tol·C))²** + risk metrics (P(bust), P(below cost), P(break-even)). UKGC (banned 2022) / MGA (disclosure required) / AU (banned 2024) compliance. No vendor publishes formal CLT convergence formula for feature-buy pricing transparency.

waves.name: Free Spins Retrigger Compound Variance — Wald + compound-sum
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 50000 episodes each (300K MC)
waves.industry_first: Closed-form Wald + compound-sum identities: N ~ shifted-geometric with E[N]=1/(1-p), Var[N]=p/(1-p)²; T=K·N: E[T]=K/(1-p), Var[T]=K²·p/(1-p)²; E[Y]=E[T]·μ (Wald), Var[Y]=E[T]·σ² + Var[T]·μ² (compound-sum). Required for UKGC RTS 14 variance disclosure + MGA PPD §11.f player protection limits.

waves.name: Cascade Sequential Multiplier Pyramid — geometric × ladder
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Closed-form Sweet-Bonanza/Sugar-Rush-style cascade × multiplier-ladder: E[Y] = μ_W·[Σ q^(k-1)·m_k + m_max·q^L/(1-q)] (geometric-sum interchange); Var[Y] via E[Y²] = σ²·E[Σm_k²] + μ²·E[S_N²] (compound + variance decomposition); tail P(reach max ladder) = q^(L-1). No vendor publishes closed-form for cascade-ladder products.

waves.name: Persistent Multiplier Accumulator — Binomial drop chain
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 50000 episodes each (300K MC)
waves.industry_first: Pragmatic / BTG-Megaways sticky multiplier closed-form: D_n ~ Binomial(n,q), running M_n = m_init + D_n·m_drop; E[Y] = μ_W·(K·m_init + q·m_drop·K(K+1)/2) (linearity + arithmetic sum); Var[Y] handles cross-spin Cov(M_n, M_m) = min(n,m)·q(1-q)·m_drop² via 2μ²·m_drop²·q(1-q)·Σn(K-n) crossSum.

waves.name: Coin Accumulator + Mystery Values — Wald + Bernoulli-Binomial nesting
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Money-Train/Money-Cart style coin-collect closed-form: N ~ Binomial(K,q), V from mystery distribution; E[Y]=E[N]·μ_V (Wald), Var[Y]=E[N]·σ²_V+Var[N]·μ²_V; P(≥1 max-value)=1−(1−q·p_max)^K (Bernoulli-Binomial nesting identity).

waves.name: Multiplicative Wild Stack Bonus — product moment formula
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: NetEnt Hotline / Wanted Dead-style PRODUCT wild multiplier closed-form: W = Π M_i over Binomial wild reels; E[W] = (p·μ_M + 1-p)^R (interchange product over per-reel active/inactive); E[W²] = (p·E[M²] + 1-p)^R; max combined = m_max^R deterministic peak.

waves.name: Ante Bet / Bet Boost Trade-Off Analyzer — decision math
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 spins each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Operator + regulator ante-bet decision math: base RTP=μ_0/1, ante RTP=μ_a/(1+a); anteIsPositiveEV iff RTP_a>RTP_b; boost premium=(RTP_a−RTP_b)/RTP_b; 2-sigma crossover N*=4σ²/μ_net² (long-run convergence budget); aggregate revenue-weighted RTP w/ adoption fraction f. UKGC RTS 12 + MGA PPD §11.f compliance + regulator-flag "player-trap" detection.

waves.name: Free Spins Lookback Multiplier Aggregator — Wald + compound variance
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Push Money Cart 4 / Hacksaw post-FS multiplier closed-form: S_K=Σ W_i, M ~ discrete distribution; E[Y]=μ_M·K·μ_W (Wald-like); Var[Y]=K·σ²_W·(σ²_M+μ²_M)+K²·μ²_W·σ²_M (compound variance decomposition). Distinct from cascade ladder (per-step), sticky accumulator (during FS), wild stack product (single-win).

waves.name: Symbol Upgrade Chain Markov — Pragmatic / BTG / Push Gaming ladder
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Closed-form Markov chain za sticky symbol upgrade kroz L+1 tier ladder: A ~ Binomial(K, p), final state F = min(A, L). P(F=i) = C(K,i)·p^i·(1-p)^(K-i) za i<L, P(F=L) = 1 − Σ_{i<L} P(F=i); E[Y]=Σ P(F=i)·v_i; log-space binomial PMF za numeričku stabilnost. Tail: P(reach top), P(stay at base)=(1-p)^K. No vendor publishes closed-form ladder Markov.

waves.name: Cluster Compound Variance — Wald compound-sum identity
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Closed-form Wald compound-sum identity za Sweet Bonanza / Reactoonz / Jammin Jars / Wild Swarm style: μ_Y = Σ clusterPmf[k]·paytable[k]; E[Y_total] = E[N]·μ_Y; **Var[Y_total] = E[N]·σ²_Y + Var[N]·μ²_Y**; 3 input modes (explicit chainPmf+clusterPmf, geometric pKill, bridge helper). No vendor publishes formal compound-sum decomposition for cluster cascade families.

waves.name: Bonus Wheel + Respin Markov — shifted-geometric chain
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: NetEnt / Pragmatic / IGT wheel bonus sa respin segmentom closed-form: N ~ shifted-geometric, E[N]=1/(1-p_respin), Var[N]=p_respin/(1-p_respin)²; conditional payout (given terminate) μ_V = Σ p_i·v_i / (1-p_respin); tail P(N≥k)=p_respin^(k-1); max payout + P(hit max). Operator/regulator-pinnable spin chain budget.

waves.name: Pick Bonus N-Stage Tree — NetEnt classic / Microgaming "pick til pop"
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Multi-stage pick-til-pop bonus tree closed-form: per-stage outcomes p_advance + p_collect + p_end = 1; P(reach 1)=1, P(reach i)=Π advance_{j<i}; P(collect at i) = P(reach i)·collect_i; E[Y] = Σ P(collect at i)·v_i; tail P(reach top), P(end with 0). Recursive stage-tree analyzer first published as auditor-verifiable closed-form.

waves.name: Bonus Trigger Wait Time Analyzer — UKGC RTS 14 + MGA PPD §11.f compliance
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Multi-feature bonus-trigger wait time closed-form: T_i ~ shifted-geometric(p_i) gives E[T_i]=1/p_i, Var[T_i]=(1-p_i)/p_i², Median=⌈log(0.5)/log(1-p_i)⌉, custom percentile k_q=⌈log(1-q)/log(1-p_i)⌉; any-feature combined p_any=1−Π(1-p_i), E[T_any]=1/p_any; aggregate rate Σ p_i; multi-feature simultaneous P(multiple)=1−P(0)−P(1). UKGC RTS 14 mandatory disclosure first published with auditor-pinnable closed-form across multi-feature trigger structures.

waves.name: Variable Reel Height Ways — BTG Megaways patent EXPIRED 2023, clean-room naming
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 episodes each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Megaways-style variable reel height ways closed-form (BTG patent expired 2023, naming standardized "variable reel height ways"): per-reel H_i ~ discrete pmf, ways W = Π_i H_i cross-reel independence; E[W] = Π_i E[H_i], Var[W] = Π_i E[H_i²] − (Π_i E[H_i])²; sparse PMF via multiplicative convolution (Cartesian × value-merge); tail maxWays, probMaxWays = Π P(H_i=max), P(W ≥ threshold) for "epic ways" disclosure. First public auditor-verifiable closed-form post patent-expiration.

waves.name: Sticky Wild Countdown Multiplier — Markov stationary chain
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 spins each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Sticky-wild countdown multiplier (Pragmatic Hot Fiesta / NetEnt Vikings Berzerk / Push Gaming Wild Swarm) (N+1)-state Markov chain stationary: π_0 = 1/(1+N·p), π_k = p/(1+N·p) for k=1..N; M_k linear (base+(k−1)·step) or geometric (base·ratio^(k−1)); E[Y per spin] = E[V]·E[M] cross-independence; Var[Y] = E[V²]·E[M²] − E[Y]²; cycle 1/p + N length, ΣM_k mult, E[V]·ΣM_k payout. Distinct from W93 (product co-active), W89 (drop-chain), W43/W97 (post-hoc), W47 (walking static). First closed-form Markov stationary published for this genre.

waves.name: Mystery Symbol Reveal Aggregator — Wald-style K ⊥ S decomposition
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 100000 spins each (600K MC)
waves.industry_first: Pre-spin mystery → in-spin uniform reveal aggregator (Pragmatic Big Bass Bonanza family / Wolf Gold / NetEnt Wild-O-Tron / Yggdrasil Vault of Anubis): K ~ countPmf positions, S ~ symbolPmf revealed symbol, Y = K · paytable[S] with K ⊥ S; E[Y] = E[K]·E[paytable[S]] (Wald-style), Var[Y] = E[K²]·E[paytable²] − E[K]²·E[paytable]²; tail P(K=0), P(K=K_max), probFullGridMaxSymbol = P(K=K_max)·P(S=max) joint; per-symbol conditional E[Y|S=s] = E[K]·paytable[s]. Distinct from W47/W91/W93/W101/W114 — first auditor-verifiable closed-form for this mehanika.

waves.name: Bonus Collect-N Trigger Tracker — Negative Binomial NB(N, p)
waves.headline: 6/6 configs PASS at 50000 episodes each (300K MC episodes)
waves.industry_first: Collect-N trigger tracker (Pragmatic Money Cart / Money Train / Stake Logic Wild Swarm / Hacksaw Money Hunt / Push Gaming Razor Shark): T_N ~ NB(N, p), P(T_N = k) = C(k−1, N−1)·p^N·(1−p)^(k−N), E[T_N] = N/p, Var[T_N] = N(1−p)/p²; tail P(T_N > k) = P(C_k < N) via log-space binomial PMF (Lanczos logGamma numerical stability); median + percentile via monotone CDF binary search; operator disclosure probTriggerWithinHorizon, expectedTriggersInHorizon = K·p/N. Distinct from W110 (Geometric N=1). First clean-room NB(N,p) closed-form for collector mehaniku.

auditor_qa.q: How do you prove the engine math implementation matches the spec?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 33 metamorphic RTP suite (50/50 PASS) + Wave 37 differential fuzz cross-language (160/160 PASS).

auditor_qa.q: How do you ensure new code does not silently break the math?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 34 mutation-score CI gate — regression mode blocks any score decline; promotion mode enforces ≥90% threshold.

auditor_qa.q: What format do you submit the PAR sheet in?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 35 USIF PAR Schema v1.0 — JSON Schema Draft 2020-12, REQUIRED baseline + OPTIONAL Tier-1 extra-credit fields.

auditor_qa.q: How do you know the game is compliant for our jurisdiction?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 36 jurisdiction auto-gate — 15 jurisdictions × 11 rules, single matrix shows PASS/WARN/FAIL per game.

auditor_qa.q: What entropy assessment do you provide for the RNG?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 39 SP 800-90B Non-IID + IID assessment — 4 estimators per source, all 6 sources clear Low-bar (≥0.5 bits).

auditor_qa.q: How is the RNG seed protected from prediction?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 38 HSM-backed DRBG seed bridge — FIPS 140-3 IG D.K continuous health tests (RCT + APT), multi-instance broadcast.

auditor_qa.q: How do we know the deployed math is the audited math?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 40 PAR Sheet Commitment v1.0 — SHA-256 Merkle commitment over full IR + HSM-signed attestation; post-cert tampering publicly detectable.

auditor_qa.q: Can we replay outcomes to verify a disputed spin?
auditor_qa.a: Wave 38 HSM seed bridge provides epoch-deterministic seed; combined with bit-exact TS↔Rust parity (Wave 37) every spin is byte-reproducible.
